skills.name: define-store
skills.description: Define reactive stores with Svelte 5 runes. Supports option stores (state, getters, actions) and setup stores (factory functions). SvelteKit SSR-safe with request-scoped state managers.

skills.name: plugins-system
skills.description: Tree-shakable plugin system for extending stores. Register plugins with createStateManager().use(). Supports persistence, history, sync, async orchestration, FSM, and validation.

skills.name: persistence-plugin
skills.description: Persist store state to localStorage, sessionStorage, IndexedDB, or memory. Supports TTL expiration, compression (LZ), pick/omit filtering, and migration strategies.

skills.name: history-plugin
skills.description: Undo/redo history with snapshots, batch operations, and time-travel debugging. Navigate between store states with full type safety.

skills.name: sync-plugin
skills.description: Multi-tab synchronization via BroadcastChannel and storage events. Keep stores in sync across browser tabs and windows.

skills.name: async-plugin
skills.description: Async action orchestration with loading/error states, request cancellation, and concurrency control policies (parallel, restartable, drop, enqueue, dedupe).

skills.name: fsm-plugin
skills.description: Finite state machine plugin for managing UI workflows. Explicit states, transitions, guards, lifecycle hooks, and controller API.

skills.name: validation-plugin
skills.description: Pre-commit state validation with rollback on failure. Define validation rules and ensure state consistency before mutations.

skills.name: inspector
skills.description: Dev-only inspector drawer for real-time state debugging. Vite plugin integration, timeline playback, action tracking, and subscription inspection.

skills.name: sveltekit-integration
skills.description: SvelteKit SSR-safe integration. Request-scoped state managers via Svelte context, hydration from load functions, and server-side safety.
